refnamediv.refpurpose: Reduces the number of colors in an image using k-means clustering

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
number_colors
The target number of colours, that is, the number of clusters to compute.
max_iterations
The maximum number of refinement iterations to perform.
tolerance
The minimum amount by which the clusters must move between iterations; once movement falls below this value the algorithm stops.
